field.name: attendance_ids
field.eval: [(5, 0, 0), (0, 0, {'name': 'Lun mattina', 'dayofweek': '0', 'hour_from': 9.0, 'hour_to': 13.0, 'day_period': 'morning'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Lun pomeriggio', 'dayofweek': '0', 'hour_from': 13.0, 'hour_to': 16.0, 'day_period': 'afternoon'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Mar mattina', 'dayofweek': '1', 'hour_from': 9.0, 'hour_to': 13.0, 'day_period': 'morning'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Mar pomeriggio', 'dayofweek': '1', 'hour_from': 13.0, 'hour_to': 16.0, 'day_period': 'afternoon'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Mer mattina', 'dayofweek': '2', 'hour_from': 9.0, 'hour_to': 13.0, 'day_period': 'morning'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Mer pomeriggio', 'dayofweek': '2', 'hour_from': 13.0, 'hour_to': 16.0, 'day_period': 'afternoon'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Gio mattina', 'dayofweek': '3', 'hour_from': 9.0, 'hour_to': 13.0, 'day_period': 'morning'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Gio pomeriggio', 'dayofweek': '3', 'hour_from': 13.0, 'hour_to': 16.0, 'day_period': 'afternoon'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Ven mattina', 'dayofweek': '4', 'hour_from': 9.0, 'hour_to': 13.0, 'day_period': 'morning'}), (0, 0, {'name': 'Ven pomeriggio', 'dayofweek': '4', 'hour_from': 13.0, 'hour_to': 16.0, 'day_period': 'afternoon'}) ]
